arts.ttl: Charlton Athletic set for summer talks with loanee midfielder
arts.sum: “We felt it was best for Terry to go and get games – that has proved a very, very good decision. Charlton Athletic manager Nathan Jones says there will be a discussion over Terry Taylor’s long-term future in the summer.

arts.ttl: Preview: Wycombe Wanderers vs. Charlton Athletic - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's League One clash between Wycombe Wanderers and Charlton Athletic, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
